data.name: April O'Neil, Kunoichi Trainee
data.oracle_text:
When April O'Neil enters, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)
April O'Neil can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.

data.name: Bebop, Warthog Warrior
data.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Rhinos you control have menace.

data.name: Brilliance Unleashed
data.oracle_text:
Choose one or both —
• Brilliance Unleashed deals 5 damage to target creature.
• Choose target artifact card in your graveyard. Return it to the battlefield if it's an artifact creature card. Otherwise, return it to the battlefield and it's a 3/3 Robot artifact creature with flying.

data.name: Buzz Bots
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
When this creature dies, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Designed for autonomous pollination, the Stocktronics buzz bot's souped-up power plant allows for months of independent service. The optional taser is for defensive purposes only, of course.

data.name: Donatello, Way with Machines
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Donatello.
data.flavor_text: "Unfortunately, the lowly turtle has been saddled by society with the stereotype of being velocity challenged."

data.name: Don & Raph, Hard Science
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever Don & Raph attack, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn has affinity for artifacts. (It costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
data.flavor_text: "Rest your brains, Donnie, I got my own idea."

data.name: Dream Beavers
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: "We've drained human life force for millennia. Then one day, turtles! Delectable! We'll suck you dry and spit out the shells!"

data.name: Fugitive Droid

{U}, Sacrifice this creature: Counter target spell that targets an artifact or creature you control.

Trample
